rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies and explains four logical inconsistencies in the artifact, providing localized fixes for each.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks its uncertainty regarding one aspect of the cost arithmetic, while confidently addressing other uncertainties.
rationale.RX.3: The agent provides detailed feedback on how to improve the coverage, ensuring that the output aligns with the requested active set.
rationale.RX.4: The agent does not introduce any new errors or harmful content and avoids downstream harm by providing clear recommendations for fixes.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, making the feedback highly traceable.
